highlights: Evaluated quality maintenance practices per BIS cement standards IS 269:2015, IS 1489 (Part 1 & 2):2015, and IS 455 (Part 1):2015.
Conducted industrial field operations at UltraTech Cement to observe structural quality control and rigorous standardization procedures in practice.
Performed physical cement engineering quality tests (fineness, setting time, strength) and analyzed data results against BIS acceptance criteria matrices to isolate operational compliance gaps.
